title: arecastrum × campos-portoanum
intro: Arecastrum × campos-portoanum, also known as the Areca Palm hybrid, is a cross between the Areca palm (Dypsis lutescens) and the Ravenea palm (Ravenea glis). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain compounds that have been used to treat various health issues. The seeds of Arecastrum × campos-portoanum have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, and they also have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and it has been used to treat conditions such as diarrhea, fever, and respiratory issues.
